channel.title: Deep Learning on Devin de Araujo
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on Devin de Araujo

item.title: RankMixer: Scaling Up Ranking Models in Industrial Recommenders
item.description: A walkthrough of the RankMixer architecture from ByteDance — a hardware-aware, attention-free ranking model that reaches 1B parameters with lower latency than its 8.7M parameter baseline.
